title: Crunchy Portuguese Garlic Shrimp
description: A fast and flavorful Portuguese-inspired shrimp dish with a crunchy garlic crust.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, breadcrumbs, garlic, salt, and pepper.
2. Pat shrimp dry with paper towels and coat in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add shrimp to skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until golden brown.
5. Remove shrimp from skillet and transfer to a plate.
6. In the same skillet, add a little more oil if necessary and sauté garlic until fragrant.
7. Serve shrimp hot, garnished with parsley.
